_provenance.command: REBAR_GATE_ALLOW_UNGATED=1 rebar criteria eval decomp-shape --output json
_provenance.note: Bounded sanity check (NOT an E2/E3 batch eval, which are permanently rejected on cost; E2 mutant corpus is not on main). HAND-AUTHORED container fixtures: one known layer-cake container plan (F1) + one known consumed-artifact-without-ordering-edge plan (F2) as must-fire positives, plus a vertical-slice container (N1) and a well-ordered producer/consumer container (N2) as must-not-fire negatives. Container criteria run over a (parent, children) decomposition, so each fixture carries the parent plan as input + a children: list; the eval_solver container arm drives pass1_container for this one criterion. Fixtures + shape checks: src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/plan-review-decomp-shape.eval.yaml + tests/unit/test_decomp_shape_criterion.py.
_provenance.pass_condition: FIRES on both positives (layer-cake + consumed-artifact) AND CLEAN on both negatives (vertical-slice + ordered producer/consumer).

interpretation: FIRES on BOTH decomposition-shape positives (F1 layer-cake, F2 consumed-artifact-without-ordering-edge) and is CLEAN on BOTH sound-decomposition negatives (N1 vertical slices, N2 producer/consumer with a declared ordering edge). recall 1.0, false-accept 0.0, stability 1.0 across all 4 cases. Posture is ADVISORY (never blocks), and advisory is its PERMANENT posture. Effectiveness is monitored going forward by the standing recorder criterion_effectiveness.py (auto-includes this criterion id, zero per-criterion wiring). Blocking-promotion is DOUBLE-gated per docs/plan-review-gate.md: it requires BOTH dogfood effectiveness evidence AND E6 judge order-stability clearing floor (E6 order-shuffle failed: fleiss_kappa=0.55 < 0.6), so it is deferred.
